name: template-skill
description: Replace with description of the skill and when Claude should use it.
capabilities: Provides standardized skill structure for Claude Code
Includes YAML frontmatter for metadata configuration
Contains placeholder sections for skill descriptions
Supports custom instructions and usage guidelines
author: davila7
securitySummary: This is a pure markdown template file containing no executable code. All 24 static findings are false positives: hash identifiers were misidentified as C2 keywords and cryptographic references, and a source URL was flagged as a hardcoded network endpoint. No network calls, file system access, command execution, or environment variable access exists in this skill.
valueStatement: This template provides a starting point for creating custom Claude skills. It includes placeholder sections for skill name, description, and instructions that you can customize for your specific use case.
limitations: This is a template file with no built-in functionality
Requires customization to create a working skill
Does not execute code or perform actions directly
Content must be written and provided by the user

useCases.title: Create new skills
useCases.description: Use this template as a starting point to create new custom skills with consistent structure and formatting.

useCases.title: Document skill behavior
useCases.description: Structure skill documentation with clear sections for descriptions, usage examples, and configuration options.

useCases.title: Standardize skill formats
useCases.description: Provide team members with a consistent template for creating and sharing skills across your organization.

promptTemplates.title: Basic skill setup
promptTemplates.scenario: Creating a new skill for specific task
promptTemplates.prompt: Use the template-skill to create a skill that helps developers write automated tests for their code. Include sections for description, when to use, and example prompts.

promptTemplates.title: Documentation skill
promptTemplates.prompt: Create a new skill using template-skill that generates API documentation from code comments and function signatures.

promptTemplates.title: Refactoring skill
promptTemplates.prompt: Use template-skill to create a skill that helps refactor legacy Python code to follow modern best practices and type hints.

promptTemplates.title: Code review skill
promptTemplates.prompt: Create a comprehensive skill using template-skill that reviews pull requests for security vulnerabilities, performance issues, and code quality.

bestPractices: Provide clear, specific instructions that define when and how to use the skill
Include concrete examples showing typical prompts and expected outputs
Document any configuration options or prerequisites clearly
antiPatterns: Leaving the template description unchanged without adding specific skill details
Creating overly vague instructions that do not guide the AI effectively
Missing examples or use cases that help users understand skill application

faq.question: What platforms support this skill?
faq.answer: This skill works with Claude, Codex, and Claude Code. Each platform interprets the instructions slightly differently.

faq.question: Can I create multiple skills from this template?
faq.answer: Yes, you can create as many skills as needed by copying the template and customizing each one for different purposes.

faq.question: How do I install a skill created from this template?
faq.answer: Skills created from this template follow standard installation methods for your Claude Code installation.

faq.question: Is my data safe when using skills?
faq.answer: This template does not access files, networks, or external services. Skills created from it may have different capabilities.

faq.question: What should I include in the description field?
faq.answer: Write a concise description explaining what the skill does and when users should invoke it. Be specific about its purpose.

faq.question: How is this different from other skill templates?
faq.answer: This template provides minimal structure for maximum flexibility. It allows complete customization of skill behavior.
